// statewave.url: Your Statewave instance. Defaults to http://localhost:8100 even without this line. Empty = preview-only.
// statewave.apiKey: Prefer setting this in USER/MACHINE settings, not here. Never commit a real key.
// statewave.subjectStrategy: auto = repo:<owner>.<repo> if a git remote exists, else workspace:<folder> ('/' is sanitized to '.' so the Statewave server accepts it)
// statewave.subject: Set to override the strategy entirely, e.g. team:platform.
// statewave.autoIndex: OFF by default. The only switch that lets the watcher send on save.
// statewave.redaction.enabled: Scrub email/phone/API-key shapes before anything leaves the editor.
